title: Teaser, Thumbnail and End-Card Content Package for a Luxury Manhattan Real-Estate YouTube Channel
one_line_ask: Produce the full per-video content package for one luxury Manhattan real-estate YouTube video — a retouched high-contrast thumbnail base plate, a podcast-style teaser cut (YouTube + LinkedIn sizes) with cleaned voice-over, and a branded end card — all from the broker's supplied portrait, penthouse still, raw walkthrough footage, end-card backplate, and wordmark logo.

issues: Very slight warm color cast on skin tones — within acceptable source-file range for designer correction
Background gradient is marginally lighter on left side than right — minor seamless backdrop unevenness, designer to normalize
Shirt collar gap is slightly asymmetric — natural and acceptable for a candid editorial look
Depth of field renders lower lapel and crossed arms at edge of acceptable softness — eyes remain tack sharp as required
No visible rim light separation on left shoulder — subtle omission but within brief tolerance for a source asset
Background is off-white rather than fully transparent (acceptable per brief, but not ideal for immediate compositing)
Slight color cast present (acceptable per brief)
Background is off-white/cream rather than transparent PNG as specified, but this is an acceptable source-file imperfection for the designer to address
Underline rule appears to extend slightly beyond the left edge of the 'S' — minor alignment nuance
Slight CGI/render quality to materials — marble and floor textures are very clean, borderline between high-end architectural photography and CG, but within acceptable threshold for a source asset
Column placement slightly interrupts the skyline view composition but is architecturally plausible
Fireplace flame rendering looks slightly stylized/CG but acceptable
No significant lens distortion visible for a stated 16-35mm wide-angle shot — verticals are very straight which is fine but slightly atypical without correction
Vignette is minimal — present but subtle, acceptable as source file

assets.name: endcard_backplate_1080p.mp4

issues: Minor drone motion blur on distant buildings, consistent with a real aerial plate.
Clean landscape aerial skyline plate with clear upper/lower negative space for the CTA overlay; no baked-in UI, subscribe button, or text; no faces or people; no real brand names.
Slight warm/teal color grade is stylistic and consistent with the prestige palette requested.

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip (regenerated 16:9 clean aerial plate); the brief backplate is ~12s. Landscape 1920x1088 with clear upper negative space for the CTA/subscribe overlay and NO baked-in UI/text. Silent (raw backplate; task audio is a separate ambient bed added downstream).

assets.name: walkthrough_raw_1080p.mp4

issues: Slight motion blur on background cityscape consistent with handheld capture — acceptable
Kitchen area slightly overexposed relative to foreground — within acceptable range for raw video frame
Bag on table is a minor compositional distraction but plausible for candid walkthrough footage

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~75s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).
